body_txt: When a couple cannot keep their hands or lips off each other for more than five seconds. Typically becomes a Running Gag , with the characters indifferent to how awkward they make everyone else feel with their nonstop public displays of affection. While the other characters are having conversations, they'll be off to the side snogging through the entire scene. This often overlaps with its Sister Trope Sickeningly Sweethearts , but sweethearts are not necessarily this physical (see any Disney Channel show), and people who make out all the time aren't necessarily sweet to each other. Related to Coitus Uninterruptus and Insatiable Newlyweds . Trope Namer is the Motion City Soundtrack song, which is decidedly not about this trope.
